tools.description: Search enabled capabilities by keyword — use before capabilities_load to find the exact capability name.
tools.name: capabilities_discover
triggers: Exploring which capabilities are currently enabled in the session.
Finding the exact capability `name` required by `capabilities_load`.
Checking whether a specific feature (e.g. "shell", "file", "knowledge") is available.
workflow: Call with a broad keyword (or omit `query` to list all capabilities).

tools.description: Load a capability into the current session — the capability's tools become callable immediately.
tools.name: capabilities_load
triggers: Activating a capability discovered via `capabilities_discover`.
Enabling a feature mid-session that was not loaded at session start.
Dynamically extending the tool set based on user needs.
workflow: Run `capabilities_discover` to find the target capability's exact `name`.

tools.description: Pause the agent loop and ask the user a blocking question. Provide optional choices to constrain the response. Use only for genuinely blocking ambiguity — make reasonable defaults for minor uncertainties.
tools.name: clarify
triggers: The technical disclosure is ambiguous on a critical feature needed to draft valid claims
Multiple legal interpretations are possible and the choice materially affects the OA strategy
The user's request is underspecified (e.g., "analyze this patent" without specifying novelty vs. infringement)
The user's instruction contradicts known patent law and needs clarification
workflow: Detect a genuine ambiguity that prevents forward progress.

tools.description: End the current task and deliver a verified summary. The summary must be ≥30 characters of meaningful prose describing what was actually done and how it was verified — placeholders like 'done', 'ok', '已完成' are rejected.
tools.name: complete
triggers: The agent has finished all requested work and verified the output
The patent draft / OA response / infringement analysis is complete and self-consistent
The user explicitly asked to stop or wrap up
The agent hits an unrecoverable dead-end and must report the result anyway
workflow: Verify all checklist items in `todo` are marked `[x]`.

tools.description: Execute a shell command. Requires user approval before running. Integrates with HooksService for pre/post-execution interception.
tools.name: execute_shell
triggers: Running a single binary or a short pipeline to gather facts (e.g., `git status`, `wc -l`, `diff`, `swift test --list`)
Invoking project build tools, formatters, or linters where no higher-level tool exists
Inspecting system state: environment variables, disk usage, process listings
workflow: Construct the command — prefer a single binary call or a short (≤2 pipe stages) fact-computing pipeline.

tools.description: View the session's file operation log — every write_file and edit_file invocation with timestamps, undo status, and content metadata.
tools.name: file_operation_history
triggers: Inspecting what file operations occurred so far in the current session
Finding the `operation_id` needed to undo a specific operation via file_undo
Auditing which files were modified, when, and by what kind of operation
Determining whether an operation is still undoable (↩️ = yes, ➡️ = no)
workflow: Call file_operation_history with no parameters to view the full log

tools.description: Undo file operations (write_file, edit_file) within the current session. Supports undo by operation ID, by file path, or last N operations.
tools.name: file_undo
triggers: Reverting a mistaken write_file or edit_file immediately after invocation
Undoing all changes to a specific file path via the `path` parameter
Rolling back the last N file operations in FIFO order via `count`
Recovery from accidental overwrites — relies on before-content captured by FileOperationLog
workflow: Optionally call file_operation_history to inspect recent operations

tools.description: 在宝宸专利知识库中检索法规、审查指南和判例文献
tools.name: knowledge_search

tools.description: 查询中国专利法律状态与事务记录 — 接入 CNIPA 公布公告系统，返回当前状态及事件时间线
tools.name: legal_status_query
triggers: 用户询问某件中国专利的"法律状态"、"是否授权"、"是否有效"
需要了解专利经历了哪些审查节点（实质审查生效、驳回、撤回等）
对方提供专利号后想快速判断该专利的当前实务状态
其他工具返回了专利号，需要进一步核实其法律效力
workflow: 确认用户提供的专利号，补全国别前缀（如 `CN`）和校验位

tools.description: Lists files matching a glob pattern within a directory tree. Use to discover project structure, find files by extension, or verify file existence before reading.
tools.name: list_files
triggers: You need to discover what files exist in a directory before reading them.
You want to find all files matching a pattern (e.g. `*.swift`, `**/Tests/**`).
You need to verify a file path exists without triggering a read error.
workflow: Determine the glob pattern and optional base path.

tools.description: 在 CNIPA、Google Patents、SooPAT 中检索专利文献，支持布尔检索式、IPC 分类号、日期过滤。
tools.name: patent_search
triggers: 用户要求"检索专利"、"查找相关专利"、"搜索现有技术"
专利查新、FTO 检索、无效检索等业务场景的前置步骤
根据技术特征构建检索式后验证命中情况
对比不同数据源（CNIPA / Google Patents）的返回结果
workflow: 从技术交底书或权利要求中提取核心检索要素（技术领域、技术问题、关键特征词）

tools.description: Reads file content with line range support, or lists directory contents.
tools.name: read_file
triggers: Read a known file path to inspect its content.
Peek at a directory to discover files before reading.
Read only a portion of a large file via line range selectors.
workflow: If unsure about file location, call `list_files` or `search_files` first.

tools.description: Searches file contents using ripgrep-style regex matching. Use to find symbol references, string occurrences, or patterns across a codebase.
tools.name: search_files
triggers: You need to find where a symbol, string, or pattern appears in the codebase.
You want to locate all call sites of a function or uses of a type.
You need to search for error messages, log strings, or configuration keys.
workflow: Craft a regex pattern that matches your target.

tools.description: Write or replace a task checklist during an agent workflow. Each invocation replaces the entire list. Use Markdown format with `- [ ]` for pending and `- [x]` for completed items.
tools.name: todo
triggers: Breaking a complex patent drafting task into sequential checkpoints (claims → description → drawings → abstract)
Tracking OA response sub-tasks (parse → compare → draft response → review)
Recording progress through a multi-source patent search
Keeping the user informed of what the agent has done and what remains
workflow: After receiving a multi-step request, plan the steps and write them as a checklist.

tools.description: Create or overwrite files with UTF-8 content. Integrates with FileOperationLog for undo.
tools.name: write_file
triggers: Creating a new file or overwriting an entire existing file
Writing generated output, configuration, or scaffolded code
Restoring a file to a known-good state (combined with undo)
workflow: Call with `dry_run: true` to preview the outcome (path, byte size)
